calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2026 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2026 Continued To Apr-01-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:12am and concluding at 10:30am.

Plaintiff ECapital Commercial Finance Corp. appearing represented by Evan Ponec, Esq., via zoom
Defendants Medforce Government Solutions, Inc., Timothy Bucklaw, and Jon Bucklaw not appearing.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's request for interest and it's justification for attorney fees.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff and custodian of records MS. SMITH via zoom and she confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff ECapital Commercial Finance Corp., and against Defendants Medforce Government Solutions, Inc., Timothy Bucklaw, and Jon Bucklaw, as follows:

Damages: $132,415.66
Prejudgment Interest: $13,710.06
Attorney Fees: $17,565.00
Costs: $2,961.03

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $166,651.75

The court is not granting line 6 of the proposed judment regarding declaratory relief. The court crosses out and is not granting this portion of the judgment.

Mr. Ponec may submit an amended judgment to the court with line 6 removed if he would like a cleaner judgment

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2025 Continued To Feb-25-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Continued To Feb-11-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Ecapital Commercial Finance Corp. appearing represented by Evan Ponce, Esq. via zoom
Defendant Medforce Government Solutions, Inc. not appearing.

There are no courtesy copies provided to dept. 505 prior to this hearing.

This matter is continued to February 11, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to allow counsel oppertunity to provide this department with courtesy copies of the relevant filings.

Off Calendar Aug-28-2025 Continued To Jan-21-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
